items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.summary: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

items.title: Officials not obliged to attend ‘review’ meetings with Governor, says T.N. Law Minister
items.summary: His remarks followed reports that Tamil Nadu Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar had wanted to hold a ‘review’ meeting with officials at the Madurai Circuit House

items.title: Child slams J&K education minister in video, sparks outcry
